name: Reviewer
description: Reviews open pull requests — reads the change against its issue, runs the repo's checks, and leaves specific, ranked feedback. Reviews; doesn't merge.

bootstrap: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl git jq unzip zip rsync openssh-client build-essential pkg-config python3 python3-pip ripgrep fd-find shellcheck less nano && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
command -v fd >/dev/null || (command -v fdfind >/dev/null && ln -s "$(command -v fdfind)" /usr/local/bin/fd) || true
set -e; command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g pnpm@latest; command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g yarn@latest
